title: Chain Crop Harvest
description: A mod that lets you harvest all nearby connected crops in one go
body:
## A mod that lets you harvest all nearby connected crops in one go

Chain Crop Harvest lets you break a single mature crop and automatically traverse adjoining farmland blocks to reap every neighboring ripe plant in one sweep. Loot tries to flow straight into your inventory and only spills to the ground when you run out of room, while each harvested crop is replanted 

![Preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9cace594fb514f6fac5d76215a27bef8150623c2.gif)
